title: personality: Add support for setting execution domain.
body:
Hi Team,

Following PR allows users to set execution domain via Linux personality. Please find a detailed discussion of 
**use-case:** https://github.com/opencontainers/runc/pull/3126#issuecomment-892161740
**upstream-PR:** https://github.com/opencontainers/runc/pull/3126 

References:
https://man7.org/linux/man-pages/man2/personality.2.html

comments.body: @vrothberg Thanks :) resolved all feedback points. Waiting for tests to pass.
@rhatdan `crun` has a support for this added by @giuseppe in https://github.com/containers/crun/pull/217 for `runc` there is a upstream pr under-review and discussions opencontainers/runc#3126
Couple of man page changes, otherwise LGTM
@giuseppe @TomSweeneyRedHat @vrothberg resolved all them could you guys please take a look again.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *flouthoc*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
